case_title: BRUCE, STEVEN VS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-28-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 BOTH PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO-TEM COMMISSIONER TO HEAR THIS CASE TODAY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUCE, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $132.00, PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT THE PACKAGE SHIPPED EXCEEDED A DECLARED VALUE IN EXCESS OF $100.00 PLEASE ALSO REVIEW THE PUBLICATION ENTITLED "GENERAL TARIFF CONTAINING THE CLASSIFICATION, RULES & PRACTICIES FOR THE TRANSPORTATION OF PROPERTY SEC 535-LIMITATIONS OF LIABILITY & 470-RETURNED PACKAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRUCE, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL SENT TO CT CORPORATION AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR RECEIPT OF PROCESS FOR UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC RETURNED SIGNED
